title: CARIFORUM-UK Joint Council establishment of a Special Committee on Services – Decision No 02/2023, 19 December 2023
body: " This page relates to a meeting that took place on 19 December 2023, during the 2022 to 2024 Sunak Conservative government, and was published later.   Decision No 02/2023 of the Joint CARIFORUM-UK Council established by the Economic Partnership Agreement (EPA) between the CARIFORUM States, of the one part, and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, of the other part, concerning the establishment of a Special Committee on Services.  "
